prompt: A cinematic high-fantasy illustration of a gigantic crimson dragon and a regal female dragon knight standing together on a rocky mountain ridge under a bright pale-blue daytime sky. The dragon dominates the frame, coiled behind and around the warrior, with 2 long sweeping golden-brown horns, a dense windswept mane of fiery red and copper hair, layered red scales with metallic sheen, a long snarling snout, sharp exposed teeth, 2 thin whiskers curling outward from the muzzle, and a fierce intelligent eye staring toward the viewer. Its back is lined with a row of sharp dorsal spines, and its massive body curves across the entire background, emphasizing scale and power. In front of the dragon stands {argument name="character name" default="a dragon knight queen"}, a tall armored woman in ornate red, black, and gold battle attire, facing forward in a heroic stance. She has {argument name="hair color" default="red"} hair styled long and flowing, partially tied up, and wears elaborate engraved plate armor with decorated pauldrons, gauntlets, a fitted breastplate, and a long layered gown-like armored skirt with intricate gold filigree. A rich crimson cape drapes behind her and catches the wind. She holds 1 unsheathed sword lowered at her side, while a second blade or dagger is visible at her waist, giving the composition exactly 2 visible weapons. The palette is dominated by scarlet, burgundy, copper, and antique gold, with dramatic sunlight, detailed textures, ultra-fine scales, polished metal, and flowing fabric. Composition is epic and centered, low-angle, full-body warrior in the foreground with the dragon’s head filling the left side and its coiled body arcing across the upper and right background. Style: ultra-detailed fantasy concept art, majestic, heroic, painterly realism, sharp focus, high contrast, volumetric light, premium game key art quality.
translatedPrompt: 一幅电影级的高奇幻插画，描绘了一头巨大的赤龙与一位威严的女性龙骑士，站在明亮淡蓝色的白昼天空下，位于岩石嶙峋的山脊之上。巨龙占据了画面主体，盘绕在战士身后，长着 2 只修长且向后延伸的棕金色龙角，一头被风吹拂的火红与铜色鬃毛，层叠的红色鳞片闪烁着金属光泽，长长的吻部露出锋利的牙齿，吻部两侧伸出 2 根向外卷曲的细长龙须，一双凶猛而智慧的眼睛凝视着观众。它的背部排列着一排锋利的背棘，巨大的身躯横跨整个背景，突显出其庞大的体型与力量。在巨龙前方站着 {argument name="character name" default="一位龙骑士女王"}，她是一位高挑的装甲女性，身着华丽的红、黑、金三色战甲，以英勇的姿态面向前方。她留着 {argument name="hair color" default="红色"} 的长发，发型飘逸且部分束起，身穿精美的雕花板甲，配有装饰性的肩甲、护手、贴合的胸甲以及带有复杂金丝镶边的长款层叠式铠甲裙。一件深红色的斗篷在她身后随风飘动。她手持 1 把出鞘的剑垂在身侧，腰间可见第 2 把刀或匕首，使构图中恰好有 2 件可见武器。色调以猩红、酒红、铜色和古金色为主，伴有戏剧性的阳光、细腻的纹理、超精细的鳞片、抛光的金属以及飘逸的织物。构图宏大且居中，采用低角度拍摄，战士全身位于前景，巨龙头部占据左侧，盘绕的身躯在上方和右侧背景中形成弧线。风格：超细节奇幻概念艺术、宏伟、英勇、写实绘画风、焦点清晰、高对比度、体积光、顶级游戏主视觉质量。

breakdown.creativeCore: 龙骑士与赤龙：一个史诗级奇幻主视觉提示词，用于生成一位英勇的装甲女性与巨型红龙在电影感山峦背景下的合影。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, full-body, layered]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, fantasy, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: volumetric, high contrast]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
